lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in fair condition. It has some mechanical wear and minor cosmetic issues. The exterior has some scratches and small dents, and the interior shows signs of use.
Good condition.

Get ready to hit the road in this dependable daily driver! While it shows some honest character from its time on the road, it remains a functional and steady choice that's ready for many more miles. It's a solid, practical vehicle that's perfect for anyone looking for a reliable way to get around!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-cared for by its previous owner. Mechanically, it is sound, with a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that has received regular oil changes and scheduled maintenance. The exterior remains attractive, though it does show minor signs of use such as a few small stone chips on the hood and a light scratch on the rear bumper. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, with all electronics, including the climate control and infotainment system, functioning as they should. The tires have plenty of tread remaining, and the brakes feel firm. This is a dependable car that is ready for its next owner without needing immediate repairs.
This vehicle is in good condition. It is mechanically sound and has been well-maintained. There is minor wear on the interior and exterior consistent with regular use.

This vehicle is in truly mint condition, appearing and driving as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep shine, and the interior remains pristine with no signs of wear. Mechanically, it is perfect—the engine is powerful, the transmission is seamless, and every feature functions exactly as intended. It has been meticulously cared for and garage-kept, making it an exceptional find for a discerning buyer who wants a like-new experience.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier acquisition for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic, this selection offers a sophisticated driving experience and enduring reliability. It stands as a testament to diligent ownership, providing an optimal balance of performance and value for those who demand excellence in a pre-owned executive transport.

Hey there! I'm looking to find a new home for my reliable ride. It’s in really great shape and has been super dependable for me—perfect for someone who wants a solid car without the brand-new price tag. It looks sharp and drives even better! I've taken good care of it, so it's ready for all your upcoming adventures. Drop me a message if you want to come see it!
This E92 M3 is a purist’s specimen featuring the S65 4.0L V8, a high-strung masterpiece with individual throttle bodies and a 12.0:1 compression ratio.
Vehicle in good condition. Recent service completed. Interior is clean. All systems functional. Clear title in hand.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive condition both inside and out. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only the minor, expected signs of careful road use, while the wheels are free of significant scuffs. Inside, you'll find a pristine, non-smoker cabin with supple upholstery and carpets that have been protected by floor mats since day one. Every electronic feature, including the premium audio system and dual-zone climate control, functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is sound; it starts promptly, idles smoothly, and the transmission provides crisp, seamless shifts. With a documented service history, recent oil service, and tires that show excellent tread depth, this car is ready for the road with no immediate maintenance required. It represents a fantastic balance of luxury and reliability for its next owner.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a rigorous professional inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for roadworthiness and driver comfort. An ideal acquisition for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of proven performance and exceptional value.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally maintained vehicle, representing a premier choice for those seeking mechanical reliability and aesthetic appeal. Having undergone a comprehensive professional assessment, this motorcar exhibits superior road manners and a well-preserved interior. It stands as a testament to diligent previous ownership, offering an optimal balance of performance and long-term value.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s been well-loved and is ready for its next adventure? This beauty is in great shape and runs like a dream. It’s been super dependable for me and is perfect for everything from daily commutes to fun weekend getaways. Come take it for a spin—I'm sure you're going to love it as much as I have!

This driver-focused E46 M3 is powered by the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and a high-revving 8,000 RPM redline. The powertrain is mated to a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential. Critical preventative maintenance has been addressed, including a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and structural reinforcement of the rear subframe to ensure chassis rigidity. The suspension utilizes upgraded polyurethane bushings and adjustable dampers for sharpened turn-in and optimized roll center geometry. While the vehicle displays minor cosmetic patina consistent with its mileage, the mechanical vitals remain robust, offering exceptional throttle response and a linear power band. Ideal for the enthusiast seeking a visceral, analog driving experience.
Reliable used car. Good condition. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Runs well. Clean title.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and comfort, presenting in excellent condition for its age. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish with only minor road wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary; the premium upholstery is free of tears, the dashboard is crack-free, and every feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the high-fidelity sound system—functions flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, backed by a comprehensive service history that ensures peace of mind for the next owner. It drives straight, shifts effortlessly, and provides a tight, responsive handling experience. If you are looking for a reliable, high-quality car that has been treated with genuine care, this is the one.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing a premier choice for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic, this automobile delivers a superior driving experience. Every aspect of this vehicle has been vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and reliability. An exceptional acquisition for those seeking an optimal balance of luxury and value.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a rigorous internal assessment to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. Offering a balanced synthesis of value and engineering excellence, this vehicle represents a premier acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a reliable, high-caliber transport solution.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty car and honestly, it's been such a joy to drive. It's in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me. I've taken great care of it, and it's ready to hit the road with its next owner! If you're looking for a dependable ride that still looks and feels great, this is definitely the one for you. Can't wait for it to find a happy new home!

This 2004 BMW M3 (E46) features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies and a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. Mechanically robust, it has received critical preventive maintenance including a subframe reinforcement kit and rod bearing replacement. The suspension geometry remains tight with upgraded poly-bushings and Bilstein B6 dampers, ensuring the M-Variable differential effectively manages torque through the rear twisties. Recent valve clearance adjustments and a cooling system overhaul make this a turn-key performance icon for the discerning driver.
Reliable daily driver. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior with minor exterior scuffs. Service records included.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and reliability. The exterior retains a high-gloss finish with only the minor, expected signs of careful road use, while the interior remains remarkably clean, smoke-free, and comfortable. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health; it has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, ensuring a smooth, quiet ride and responsive handling. All electronic features, including the premium sound system and dual-zone climate control, function exactly as they should. This is a turn-key opportunity for a buyer seeking a well-cared-for car that looks and drives beautifully. Service records are organized and available for your review.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Having undergone a rigorous inspection process, this unit demonstrates consistent performance and a refined cabin environment. It serves as an ideal selection for those seeking a balance of sophisticated engineering and proven reliability.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation, this unit offers a refined driving experience. Every aspect of its presentation reflects a commitment to quality and reliable performance, ensuring exceptional value for its next owner.

Hey there! I'm looking to find a new home for my trusty ride. It's been super reliable and is still in really solid shape, perfect for someone who wants a dependable car without the new-car price tag. I've taken great care of it, and it drives like a dream! Come take it for a spin—you're going to love how it handles the road. Can't wait to hear from you!

Offered is a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 inline-six power plant. This unit maintains excellent compression across all cylinders and crisp throttle response via its independent throttle bodies. The high-pressure Double-VANOS system has been recently serviced, ensuring optimal cam phasing throughout the rev range. Power is delivered through a precise 6-speed manual gearbox to a GKN-visco-lok limited-slip differential. Chassis dynamics remain sharp with refreshed bushings and a preventative subframe reinforcement kit already installed. Recent oil analysis shows no signs of premature rod bearing wear, making this a turn-key performance driver for the serious enthusiast
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior. Minor cosmetic wear.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and reliability, presenting beautifully both inside and out. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine with only minor cosmetic blemishes consistent with careful road use. Inside, you’ll find a clean, smoke-free cabin featuring premium materials that have been well-preserved, with all electronic components, climate control, and infotainment features functioning flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health; the engine pulls strongly, the transmission shifts smoothly, and it has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer’s schedule. We have recently performed a full multi-point inspection, confirming that the brakes and tires have plenty of life remaining. This is a turn-key car that has been cared for with an eye for detail, ready for its next owner to enjoy without immediate concern for maintenance. Full service history documentation is included with the sale.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This specimen has been curated to meet our rigorous standards, offering a seamless blend of performance and reliability. Every aspect of its maintenance history underscores a commitment to quality, ensuring a driving experience that remains both refined and dependable. An exceptional acquisition for the discerning motorist seeking value without compromise.
